Entry.JapaneseText: うまい！ こんなにうまいカレーパンは 生まれて初めて食べた
Entry.EnglishText: Delicious! This is the first time I've eaten such incredible curry bread!

Entry.JapaneseText: この焼き鳥丼パン……すごくおいしい
Entry.EnglishText: This grilled chicken rice bowl bread... It's phenonmal.

Entry.JapaneseText: やっぱり女は黙って焼き鳥丼ね！
Entry.EnglishText: Just like I thought, women stay out of it and have their grilled chicken rice bowl!
Entry.Notes: Should I leave this be? The more literal tl is like, "women should stay quiet and just eat their grilled chicken rice bowl". I know the official loc changed that bc it sounds pretty sexist, so I don't know if I should change it here too.

Entry.JapaneseText: 焼き鳥丼パンとは……斬新だな
Entry.EnglishText: Grilled chicken rice bowl bread... How original.

Entry.JapaneseText: どうしても、と言われたからな。 カレーは甘口にしろとか いちいち注文が細かい奴らだ
Entry.EnglishText: They're the kind of people who are super specific about wanting their orders mild.
Entry.Notes: Not completely sure about this one.

Entry.JapaneseText: お土産を頼んでいいか？ カニタマパンを一つ
Entry.EnglishText: Could I ask you for a gift of sorts? One crab omelette bread.
